question: The bar chart shows the revenue for several years. Which statement about the revenues is most appropriate based on the chart?

options.A: The last two years clearly have different revenues, with 2021 higher than 2022.
options.B: The last two years have exactly the same revenue.
options.D: We cannot determine which of the last two years has higher revenue because their bars extend beyond the top of the chart.

explanation: The bar tops are clipped outside the visible plotting area, so equality or ordering for the clipped bars cannot be inferred.
